perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a close-up of a container filled with colorful makeup brushes, quickly panning to a woman sitting at a desk with no makeup on, showing some skin blemishes. (2) A person's hand points back and forth between a large, overflowing box of makeup and a small green translucent plastic bag containing only a few items, highlighting a contrast. (3) A montage of different women in an indoor setting follows; they are seen using sponges, brushes, and palettes to apply products to their faces while looking into mirrors. (4) The woman from the beginning is shown again, now with finished makeup, intentionally squeezing her neck to emphasize a double chin for the camera. (5) Another woman is seen laughing hysterically at the gesture.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-tempo, upbeat electronic pop music starts immediately. A female voice is heard laughing and speaking in Mandarin Chinese with an energetic, friendly tone. (2) The music continues as a constant background layer while several female voices overlap, creating a bustling, social atmosphere. Sounds of laughter and the soft clicking of makeup containers are audible. (3) The vocal intensity peaks during a conversation about the amount of makeup brought. (4) A sharp, comedic 'cartoon-style' sound effect plays at the end, coinciding with a sudden visual gag.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 'HAHA化妆课' (HAHA Makeup Class) and '超級大素顏' (Super bare face) appear as opening hooks. (2) Functional text appears as dialogue subtitles: '叫妳帶一點點化妝品就好了' (Told you to bring just a little makeup), '家當都帶來了' (Brought all belongings), '因為要挑啊 我就懶得挑' (Because I have to choose, I was too lazy to). (3) '偶素小資女' (I'm a budget girl) appears as decorative hook text over the small plastic bag. (4) '(老酥好美)' (Teacher is so beautiful) appears as a variety-show style emotional sticker. (5) '修容就是這樣子' (Contouring is like this) and '譴責!!' (Condemn!!) appear in bold, expressive fonts during the humorous ending.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Humorous Comparison -> Fast-paced Makeup Process Montage -> Comedic Outro

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main woman featured prominently, 1 teacher in white, and approximately 6 other female students or assistants in the background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A woman in her late 20s wearing a black graphic t-shirt with a cartoon print, initially seen with her hair tied up and no makeup.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A classroom or studio setting with long wooden tables covered in makeup products, mirrors, and organizers. A large Dragon Ball Vegeta figure is visible on a shelf in the background.

audio_production_style.audioTransition: Hard cut with background music bridging the scenes

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to entertain and promote a makeup class by showcasing a fun, relatable, and slightly chaotic atmosphere. It uses humor, specifically the contrast between a minimalist and a maximalist approach to bringing makeup supplies, and a self-deprecating joke at the end to create a friendly and accessible image for the workshop.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video prominently features a makeup class 'HAHA化妝課' and shows various professional makeup brands being used in a workshop setting.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-density variety-show style text overlays and rapid montage editing.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video captures a highly social 'girls' day out' vibe which is common in Asian lifestyle vlogging to promote beauty services.
